title: Electronic Approval and Document Workflow System

prd.oneLiner: Connect document templates, routing rules, electronic approval, rejection and resubmission, history, and operations reporting.
prd.goal: Reduce average document approval lead time by 25% and track 100% of approval history.
prd.whyNow: Document forms, approval routes, and decisions are spread across email and shared folders, weakening policy compliance and auditability.
prd.problem: Document forms, approval routes, and decisions are spread across email and shared folders, weakening policy compliance and auditability.
prd.solution: Connect document templates, routing rules, electronic approval, rejection and resubmission, history, and operations reporting.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee creating and routing a document
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Document forms, approval routes, and decisions are spread across email and shared folders, weakening policy compliance and auditability.

targets.name: Approval policy and document operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Document forms, approval routes, and decisions are spread across email and shared folders, weakening policy compliance and auditability.

scenarios.text: Employee creating and routing a document completes approval-document creation and attachment submission and checks progress.
Approval policy and document operations coordinator reviews approval lead-time and bottleneck reporting by document type.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce average document approval lead time by 25% and track 100% of approval history.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Approval-route assignment, approval, rejection, and resubmission handling
Approval lead-time and bottleneck reporting by document type
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
